label: No pinned style
notes: Let generate_song_prompt derive style from the message only. Use this for proper-noun trap checks.

label: Indie pop
notes: Genre pill only — LLM writes the detailed style_prompt. Edit or replace style_prompt to pin exact wording.

label: Tech house (pinned prompt)
style_prompt: Driving tech house, 126 BPM, four-on-the-floor kick, rolling bassline, dry hats, late-night warehouse energy. Male vocal, confident and rhythmic, not melodic ballad.
notes: Pinned style_prompt skips LLM style writing when using --lyrics-mode fixed, or overrides after pipeline when using --force-style-prompt.

label: Ghostly trap
style_prompt: Ghostly, hypnotic trap. Heavy 808s, sparse hi-hats, dark atmospheric pads. Low deadpan male vocal, minimal emotion.
notes: Example pinned production brief — replace freely.

label: Trap clean deadpan
style_prompt: Trap vibes, clean sound, creative melody, fat punchy kicks. Rap with deadpan monotone flat vocal delivery.
notes: Competition style brief for lyria/ace/eleven/minimax/suno bakeoff.
